title: RunPod console link in Settings
description: Add a one-click link to the RunPod console pods page in the remote-engine Settings section so users can check Pod state/telemetry/logs/spend when a boot stalls or they want ground truth. Deep-link to the active Pod when connected (console.runpod.io/pods?id=<podId>), fall back to the static list (console.runpod.io/pods) otherwise. App-side only, no rebuild. Born from MPI-103 live testing: RunPod hands out occasional bad hosts that stall the container pull at 0% — the app already warns + offers Cancel/retry, but a console link helps the user self-diagnose.
